heading: Supplement to plan for declassification of restricted data and formerly restricted data
label: 6233 Supplement to plan for declassification of restricted data and formerly restricted data
notes: References in TextExecutive Order No. 12958, referred to in subsec. (b), is Ex. Ord. No. 12958, , 60 F.R. 19825, which was formerly set out as a note under , War and National Defense, and was revoked by Ex. Ord. No. 13526, § 6.2(g), , 75 F.R. 731.Apr. 17, 1995Dec. 29, 2009section 3161 of Title 50
Prior ProvisionsProvisions similar to those in this section were contained in , War and National Defense, prior to repeal by .section 2673 of Title 50Pub. L. 119–60, § 3111(b)(1)

children.heading: .—Supplement to Plan
children.label: a .—Supplement to Plan
children.text: The Secretary of Energy and the Archivist of the United States shall, after consultation with the members of the National Security Council and in consultation with the Secretary of Defense and the heads of other appropriate Federal agencies, develop a supplement to the plan required under subsection (a) of section 6232.

children.heading: .—Contents of Supplement
children.label: b .—Contents of Supplement
children.text: The supplement shall provide for the application of that plan (including in particular the element of the plan required by section 6232(b)(1)) to all records subject to Executive Order No. 12958 that were determined before , to be suitable for declassification.October 17, 1998

children.heading: .—Limitation on Declassification of Records
children.label: c .—Limitation on Declassification of Records
children.text: All records referred to in subsection (b) shall be treated, for purposes of subsection (c) of section 6232, in the same manner as records referred to in subsection (a) of such section.

children.heading: .—Submission of Supplement
children.label: d .—Submission of Supplement
children.text: The Secretary of Energy shall submit the supplement required under subsection (a) to the recipients of the plan referred to in subsection (d) of section 6232.
